visibility.description: Control whether daycares can find your profile in the candidate pool.
visibility.toggleHint: When enabled, foundations can view your profile in the candidate pool.

findJobs.a: Browse the Job Board to see all available positions. You can filter by location, contract type, and other criteria. Click on a job to view details and apply.
findJobs.q: How do I find job openings?

notifications.a: Go to Settings > Notification Preferences to customize which notifications you receive via email or in-app.

trackApplications.a: View all your applications in the My Applications section. You can see the status of each application and any updates from employers.
trackApplications.q: How do I track my job applications?

updateProfile.a: Go to your profile page to update your skills, qualifications, experience, and availability. A complete profile increases your chances of being matched with suitable positions.
updateProfile.q: How do I update my profile?

mock.pedagogyStatement: Our pedagogy is based on the principles of respect, creativity, and individual development. We believe in providing a nurturing environment where children can explore, learn, and grow at their own pace.

manageProfile.a: Go to Organization Profile to update your branding, contact information, opening hours, and other details that parents see.

recruitment.a: Navigate to Recruitment > Job Listings and click 'Post New Job' to create a job posting. You can view applicants and manage the hiring process from there.
recruitment.q: How do I post job openings?

useMarketplace.a: Browse products and services from verified suppliers. Add items to your order cart and submit orders directly through the platform.

parentLeadFormPage.subtitle: Tell us about your childcare needs

dataSecurity.a: Yes, we take data security seriously. Your information is encrypted and only shared with daycares you've enquired with. Read our Privacy Policy for more details.

matchingProcess.a: Our system matches your child's needs with suitable daycares based on location, age, special requirements, and availability. You'll receive responses from matching providers.
matchingProcess.q: How does the matching process work?

responseTime.a: Most daycares respond within 2-3 business days. You can track the status of your enquiries in your dashboard.
responseTime.q: How quickly will I receive responses?

addProduct.a: Go to Products and click 'Add New Product'. Fill in the product details, set pricing, and upload images. Products will be reviewed before going live.
addProduct.q: How do I add a new product?

commissionRates.a: Commission rates vary by product category and subscription plan. Check your subscription details in Settings > Billing & Subscription.

manageProfile.a: Update your company information, contact details, and business hours in Settings > Company Profile.

processOrders.a: View all orders in the Orders section. You can accept, decline, or mark orders as shipped. Orders are automatically synced with the foundation's dashboard.
